free_text: Effective interaction for 40Ca(p,p') at E(p)=318 MeV
40Ca with areal thicknesses of 19.7 and 18.97 mg/cm2.
Scattered protons detected by focal plane array
described in Atencio, et al., Nuc.Instr.Meth. 187,
Beam polarization monitored using line-C polarimeter.
